title: microRNA Ct values for dogs with idiopathic epilepsy and controls
author: García Gracia, Mireya
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The excel file contains the Ct values obtained in the different reactions of real time quantitative PCR for 9 microRNAs (cel-miR-39-3p, miRNA-16, miR-27a-3p , miR-93-5p , miRNA-103 , miRNA-132 , miRNA-142, miR-146a and miRNA-574) in plasma exosomes of dogs with epilepsy and controls. This is complementary data to the manuscript: Analysis of plasma-derived exosomal microRNAs as potential biomarkers for canine idiopathic epilepsy.
